source.title: Plugins for Claude Code and Cowork | Anthropic
notes: This registry mirrors the public Claude plugin directory as catalog metadata for project templates.
Each entry also has a local package folder under agent-assets/claude-plugin-directory/plugins.
Local folders are disabled-by-default mirrors. They do not include credentials, OAuth grants, or remote package payloads that are not exposed by the public directory page.
Capability labels are directory-card keyword hints, not a replacement for each plugin manifest.

defaults.verification: verify each plugin after installation in the target environment

plugins.name: Frontend Design
plugins.description: Craft production-grade frontends with distinctive design. Generates polished code that avoids generic AI aesthetics.

plugins.name: Superpowers
plugins.description: Claude learns brainstorming, subagent development with code review, debugging, TDD, and skill authoring through Superpowers.

plugins.name: Context7
plugins.description: Upstash Context7 MCP server for live docs lookup. Pull version-specific docs and code examples from source repos into LLM context.

plugins.name: Code Review
plugins.description: AI code review with specialized agents and confidence-based filtering for pull requests

plugins.name: Code Simplifier
plugins.description: Code clarity agent: simplifies and refines recently modified code while preserving functionality and consistency.

plugins.description: Create, improve, and measure skills. Use for creating, updating, evaluating, and benchmarking performance.
